<!-- Generated by pnpm run docgen. Do not edit directly. -->

Game event subscriptions.

## Supported Events

`on` and `once` support every event below. `waitFor` excludes packet events.

See <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-map/" data-script-type="script-event-map"><code>ScriptEventMap</code></a> for the full event-name-to-payload map.

| Event | `on` / `once` | `waitFor` | Payload |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `packetFromClient` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> |  | `string` |
| `packetFromServer` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> |  | `string` |
| `extensionResponse` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> |  | `string` |
| `monsterDeath` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-monster-death-event/" data-script-type="script-event-monster-death-event"><code>ScriptEventMonsterDeathEvent</code></a> |
| `questComplete` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-quest-complete-event/" data-script-type="script-event-quest-complete-event"><code>ScriptEventQuestCompleteEvent</code></a> |
| `zone` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-zone-event/" data-script-type="script-event-zone-event"><code>ScriptEventZoneEvent</code></a> |
| `joinMap` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-join-map-event/" data-script-type="script-event-join-map-event"><code>ScriptEventJoinMapEvent</code></a> |
| `animationMessage` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-animation-message-event/" data-script-type="script-event-animation-message-event"><code>ScriptEventAnimationMessageEvent</code></a> |
| `auraAdded` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-aura-event/" data-script-type="script-event-aura-event"><code>ScriptEventAuraEvent</code></a> |
| `auraRemoved` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | `Omit<ScriptEventAuraEvent, "aura">` |
| `afk` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-afk-event/" data-script-type="script-event-afk-event"><code>ScriptEventAfkEvent</code></a> |
| `antiCounterStart` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-anti-counter-event/" data-script-type="script-event-anti-counter-event"><code>ScriptEventAntiCounterEvent</code></a> |
| `antiCounterEnd` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | `Omit<ScriptEventAntiCounterEvent, "durationMs">` |
| `playerDeath` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-player-death-event/" data-script-type="script-event-player-death-event"><code>ScriptEventPlayerDeathEvent</code></a> |
| `playerLocation` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> | <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-player-location-event/" data-script-type="script-event-player-location-event"><code>ScriptEventPlayerLocationEvent</code></a> |

## Members

<a id="member-api-events-on"></a>

### `api.events.on()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/app/src/renderer/windows/game/scripting/ScriptApi.ts#L219" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: app/src/renderer/windows/game/scripting/ScriptApi.ts:219" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Subscribes to an event.

```ts
api.events.on(eventName: E, handler: ScriptEventListener<E>): Effect.Effect<ScriptEventDisposer, ScriptExecutionError | ScriptNotReadyError, never>
```

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `eventName` | `E` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> |  |
| `handler` | <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-listener/" data-script-type="script-event-listener"><code>ScriptEventListener</code></a>&lt;`E`&gt; | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> |  |

**Yields:** <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-disposer/" data-script-type="script-event-disposer"><code>ScriptEventDisposer</code></a>

**Errors:** `ScriptExecutionError` \| `ScriptNotReadyError`

<a id="member-api-events-once"></a>

### `api.events.once()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/app/src/renderer/windows/game/scripting/ScriptApi.ts#L229" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: app/src/renderer/windows/game/scripting/ScriptApi.ts:229" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Subscribes once, then disposes the listener.

```ts
api.events.once(eventName: E, handler: ScriptEventListener<E>): Effect.Effect<ScriptEventDisposer, ScriptExecutionError | ScriptNotReadyError, never>
```

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `eventName` | `E` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> |  |
| `handler` | <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-listener/" data-script-type="script-event-listener"><code>ScriptEventListener</code></a>&lt;`E`&gt; | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> |  |

**Yields:** <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-disposer/" data-script-type="script-event-disposer"><code>ScriptEventDisposer</code></a>

**Errors:** `ScriptExecutionError` \| `ScriptNotReadyError`

<a id="member-api-events-waitfor"></a>

### `api.events.waitFor()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/app/src/renderer/windows/game/scripting/ScriptApi.ts#L239" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: app/src/renderer/windows/game/scripting/ScriptApi.ts:239" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Waits for the next matching game event. Packet events are not supported.

```ts
api.events.waitFor(eventName: E, options?: ScriptEventWaitOptions<E>): Effect.Effect<ScriptEventMap[E] | null, unknown, never>
```

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `eventName` | `E` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> |  |
| `options` | <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-wait-options/" data-script-type="script-event-wait-options"><code>ScriptEventWaitOptions</code></a>&lt;`E`&gt; |  |  |

**Yields:** <a href="/scripting/types/script-event-map/" data-script-type="script-event-map"><code>ScriptEventMap</code></a>[`E`] \| `null`

**Errors:** `ScriptNotReadyError` \| `unknown`
